Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 14), dh-sequence-python3, gettext, libgtk-3-dev, libibus-1.0-dev, libjson-glib-dev, liblua5.4-dev, libnotify-dev, libopencc-dev (>= 1.1.9~), libpinyin15-dev (>= 2.10), libsoup-3.0-dev, libsqlite3-dev, libtool, pkgconf, python3-gi, python3:any, sqlite3, uuid-dev
Description: Intelligent Pinyin engine based on libpinyin for IBus It includes a Chinese Pinyin input method and a Chinese ZhuYin (Bopomofo) input method based on libpinyin for IBus.
